notes: Hinton FF with local per-layer goodness loss trained as specified (L=6 width=512 K=24 theta=2.0 8000 steps, layer 1 frozen, per-layer Adam lr=3e-4, unigram negatives). Training finished in 96s (well under 300s budget) at 2.7 kJ; val char-acc 0.2351 just below the honest target of 0.25 (and far below the 0.70 DQ floor), confirming FF carries some LM signal but substantially weaker than cross-entropy on the same compute.
